---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What decision or workflow would this improve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Why Frontier Scout?

Explain why this belongs in the local radar, lab, report, or future agent
surface instead of an external tool.

## Constraints

List cost, privacy, security, or compatibility constraints.
